_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of secure software deployment tools and techniques
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Knowledge AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.513), TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.502).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.548). Shared vocabulary: [deployment, knowledge]. NICE-only terms [secure, software, techniques, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.918, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.075 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of secure software deployment tools and techniques" and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.554 ≈ STS 0.548 (gap 0.006). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [deployment, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [deployment, knowledge]. NICE-only: [secure, software, techniques, tools]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployments, edge, failure].
